name: New Delhi-Style Chick Pea Hummus
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the chick peas until very tender, up to 3 hours.
2. Drain and cool the cooked chick peas.
3. Transfer to a food processor.
4. Add ginger, Jalapeno pepper, lime juice, almond butter, almond oil, cilantro, mint leaves, salt, pepper, and toasted cumin seeds.
5. Process until smooth.
6. Season with salt and pepper as desired.
7. Place the hummus in a shallow serving dish.
8. Smooth the top with a spatula.
9. Sprinkle with additional toasted cumin seeds.
10. Serve with crudites such as bell peppers, carrots, snow peas, and celery.
11. Refrigerate for up to 3 days.
